title: 1965 Gibson SG Standard Electric Guitar
description: Vintage 1965 Gibson SG Standard in cherry red finish. Original pickups and hardware, well-maintained with minor wear from age.

title: Original Apple Macintosh 128K (1984)
description: First-generation Apple Macintosh 128K released in 1984. Fully functional with keyboard and mouse included.

title: Rolex Submariner 16610
description: Authentic Rolex Submariner 16610 with stainless steel case and black dial. Excellent condition with original box and papers.

description: Rare 1925 first edition copy of The Great Gatsby. Original dust jacket in good condition with slight fading.

description: Authentic Eames Lounge Chair and Ottoman in walnut and black leather. Classic mid-century design.

description: Limited edition original screen print by Banksy. Signed and numbered with certificate of authenticity.

title: Vintage Leica M3 Camera
description: Classic Leica M3 35mm rangefinder camera from the 1950s. Fully operational with original lens included.

title: 1967 Ford Mustang Fastback
description: Restored 1967 Ford Mustang Fastback with V8 engine. Excellent exterior and interior condition.

description: Iconic Omega Speedmaster Professional Moonwatch. Stainless steel bracelet with original packaging.

title: Signed Michael Jordan Rookie Card (1986)
description: 1986 Fleer Michael Jordan rookie card, autographed and graded. Highly collectible sports memorabilia.
